commands.name: list-timeline
commands.title: List Tax Timeline
commands.subtitle: FreeAgent
commands.description: List tax timeline items from FreeAgent

commands.name: list-bank-transactions
commands.title: List Bank Transactions
commands.subtitle: FreeAgent
commands.description: List all bank transactions from FreeAgent, including explained and unexplained

commands.name: list-unexplained-transactions
commands.title: List Unexplained Transactions
commands.subtitle: FreeAgent
commands.description: List unexplained bank transactions that need attention for bookkeeping

tools.name: analyze-financials
tools.title: Analyze Financials
tools.description: Analyze financial data and provide insights about invoices, cash flow, and business performance

tools.name: find-invoice
tools.title: Find Invoice
tools.description: Find specific invoices using natural language search criteria like client name, reference, amount, or date

tools.name: create-invoice-ai
tools.title: Create Invoice with AI
tools.description: Create an invoice using natural language input for client name, services, and amount

tools.name: categorize-transactions
tools.title: Categorize Transactions
tools.description: Analyze and categorize bank transactions to help understand spending patterns and identify unexplained transactions

tools.name: client-insights
tools.title: Client Insights
tools.description: Analyze client payment patterns, revenue contributions, and business relationships to provide insights about your customers

tools.name: cash-flow-summary
tools.title: Cash Flow Summary
tools.description: Analyze cash flow patterns, incoming and outgoing money, and provide forecasts to help with business financial planning

tools.name: search-explained-transactions
tools.title: Search Explained Transactions
tools.description: Search through previously explained bank transactions to find patterns and provide context for understanding transaction explanations

tools.name: match-file-to-transaction
tools.title: Match File to Transaction
tools.description: Match files (invoices, receipts, etc.) to bank transactions using date, amount, and description, then provide attachment and explanation suggestions

tools.name: add-bank-transaction-explanation
tools.title: Add Bank Transaction Explanation
tools.description: Add an explanation to a bank transaction in FreeAgent, including category assignment and tax details. Use for UNEXPLAINED transactions only.

tools.name: update-bank-transaction-explanation
tools.title: Update Bank Transaction Explanation
tools.description: Update an existing bank transaction explanation in FreeAgent. Use for MARKED_FOR_REVIEW transactions that already have auto-generated explanations.

tools.name: upload-attachment
tools.title: Upload File Attachment
tools.description: Upload a file attachment (receipt, invoice, etc.) to FreeAgent that can be associated with bank transaction explanations

tools.name: list-categories
tools.title: List Categories
tools.description: List all available FreeAgent categories for transaction explanations and categorization

tools.name: update-bank-transaction
tools.title: Update Bank Transaction
tools.description: Update bank transaction properties, particularly to clear marked_for_review status after updating explanations

tools.name: get-all-bank-transactions
tools.title: List Bank Transactions
tools.description: List bank transactions across all or specific accounts. Filter by status (unexplained, marked_for_review, explained, etc.), date range, and account. Returns explanation URLs for transactions that have them — use these when calling update-bank-transaction-explanation.

tools.name: list-projects
tools.title: List Projects
tools.description: List FreeAgent projects. Returns each project's URL — required by create-task-ai, list-tasks, list-timeslips-ai, delete-project, and create-timeslip-ai.

tools.name: create-project
tools.title: Create Project
tools.description: Create a new project in FreeAgent for a given contact. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: delete-project
tools.title: Delete Project
tools.description: Permanently delete a FreeAgent project. Requires confirmation. Projects with attached invoices/tasks/timeslips cannot be deleted — mark them Hidden/Completed instead.

tools.name: list-tasks
tools.title: List Tasks
tools.description: List tasks, optionally scoped to a project URL. Returns each task's URL — required by update-task, delete-task, and create-timeslip-ai.

tools.name: create-task-ai
tools.title: Create Task
tools.description: Create a task inside a project (provide a project URL from list-projects). Requires confirmation.

tools.name: update-task
tools.title: Update Task
tools.description: Edit a task's name, billing rate, billable flag, billing period, or status. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: delete-task
tools.title: Delete Task
tools.description: Permanently delete a task. Requires confirmation. Tasks with timeslips cannot be deleted — use update-task with status=Hidden/Completed instead.

tools.name: list-timeslips-ai
tools.title: List Timeslips
tools.description: List timeslips (timesheet entries) with optional filters by project, task, user, view, and date range. Returns each timeslip's URL — required by update-timeslip and delete-timeslip.

tools.name: create-timeslip-ai
tools.title: Create Timeslip
tools.description: Log a timesheet entry against a task. Requires confirmation. Project is inferred from the task; user defaults to the authenticated user.

tools.name: update-timeslip
tools.title: Update Timeslip
tools.description: Edit an existing timeslip — including switching it to a different task. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: delete-timeslip
tools.title: Delete Timeslip
tools.description: Permanently delete a timeslip. Requires confirmation.

ai.instructions:
You are an AI assistant that helps users manage their FreeAgent accounting data. Always provide clear, actionable insights and use emojis to make the output more readable. When analyzing financial data, focus on practical business insights and recommendations. Format currency amounts appropriately and highlight important information like overdue invoices or cash flow issues. If authentication is required, guide the user to authenticate with FreeAgent first.

For bank transactions:
• Use get-all-bank-transactions for all listing queries — filter by view (unexplained, marked_for_review, explained, all, manual, imported), date range, or account. This tool also exposes each transaction's existing explanation URLs, which you'll need for the marked-for-review workflow below.
• Use list-categories to show available categories before creating explanations.

**IMPORTANT - Bank Transaction Explanation Workflow:**
• For UNEXPLAINED transactions: Use add-bank-transaction-explanation to create new explanations.
• For MARKED_FOR_REVIEW transactions:
  1. Call get-all-bank-transactions with view='marked_for_review' to find the transaction and read its explanation URL from the output.
  2. Use update-bank-transaction-explanation with that explanationUrl to modify the auto-generated explanation.
  3. Use update-bank-transaction with markedForReview=false to clear the flag and finalize the transaction.
• If add-bank-transaction-explanation returns a 422 error about 'already explained', the transaction is marked for review — use the 3-step process above.

**File Attachments:**
• Use upload-attachment to upload receipts, invoices, or supporting documents
• The upload returns an attachment URL that can be used with explanation tools
• Attachments can be added when creating new explanations or updating existing ones

Use search-explained-transactions to find patterns in historical transactions. Use match-file-to-transaction to help users attach files (invoices, receipts) to the correct transactions with proper explanations. Always confirm before making changes to transaction explanations or file attachments.

**Projects, Tasks & Timeslips Workflow:**
• Always start by calling list-projects to resolve project URLs from a name. For task-scoped operations, then call list-tasks with the project URL.
• Use create-project / delete-project to manage projects. Both require confirmation; delete fails if the project has invoices, tasks, or timeslips — mark it Hidden/Completed via update on the FreeAgent UI instead.
• Use create-task-ai / update-task / delete-task to manage tasks. All require confirmation. Tasks with timeslips cannot be deleted — use update-task with status=Hidden or Completed instead.
• For "cleanup tasks and recreate from a structure" requests: first list the project's tasks, then for each task call delete-task; if that fails because the task has timeslips, fall back to update-task status=Hidden. Then create the new tasks with create-task-ai.
• Use list-timeslips-ai to find existing timesheet entries (filter by projectUrl, taskUrl, fromDate/toDate). Use create-timeslip-ai to log new time against a task — project and user are inferred automatically. Use update-timeslip to edit an entry (including switching it to a different task by passing taskUrl). Use delete-timeslip to remove an entry.

evals.input: @freeagent show me my financial overview
@freeagent find invoice for ABC Company
@freeagent create invoice for John Smith for £500 consulting work
@freeagent analyze my spending patterns
@freeagent show me client insights for ABC Company
@freeagent what's my cash flow looking like?
@freeagent list my unexplained transactions
@freeagent show me transactions marked for review
@freeagent search for explained transactions from ABC Company
@freeagent find previous software subscription payments
@freeagent match invoice file 'Invoice_ABC_500.pdf' with amount £500 dated 2024-01-15
@freeagent attach receipt for £25 coffee expense from today
@freeagent add explanation for transaction https://api.freeagent.com/v2/bank_transactions/123 as office supplies for £50
@freeagent update explanation https://api.freeagent.com/v2/bank_transaction_explanations/456 to change description to 'updated office supplies'
@freeagent upload receipt file receipt.pdf with base64 data ABC123
@freeagent show me available categories for transactions
@freeagent update transaction https://api.freeagent.com/v2/bank_transactions/123 to clear marked for review status
@freeagent show me all bank transactions from the last 30 days

@freeagent finalise the marked-for-review transaction https://api.freeagent.com/v2/bank_transactions/123 — update its explanation https://api.freeagent.com/v2/bank_transaction_explanations/456 to 'office supplies' and clear the review flag
@freeagent show me my projects
@freeagent list tasks for the Acme website project
@freeagent log 2 hours today on the Acme design task
@freeagent delete the timeslip https://api.freeagent.com/v2/timeslips/42

preferences.name: default_payment_terms_in_days
preferences.title: Default Payment Terms (In Days)
preferences.description: The default payment terms for new invoices (In Days)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
